title: Onboarding - Eula page - License Agreement and Privacy Policy links when the internet is turned off
scenario: User taps License Agreement or Privacy Policy links on EULA page without internet and sees "Something went wrong" screen, then taps Cancel to return to the "Well hello, first things first..." screen.
steps: Turn off the internet connection on the device.
Open the app and navigate to the EULA page.
expected: Tapping the License Agreement or Privacy Policy links should load the respective content or show an appropriate error message. Tapping Cancel should return the user to the "Well hello, first things first..." screen.
